worksheet_title: Searching for the Best Threshold Value
framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024
note: Each item contributes evidence toward one or more AI-CFT learning objectives. Learning objectives are evidence accumulators across multiple worksheets rather than pass/fail outcomes.

WS4_B1.rationale: Identifies which instances are misclassified under an existing threshold, demonstrating interpretation of model behaviour rather than optimisation.

WS4_B2.rationale: Searches for a better threshold, compares alternatives and justifies parameter selection using classification performance.

WS4_B3.rationale: Explains why a threshold cannot always be placed between adjacent observations, demonstrating conceptual understanding of threshold constraints.

WS4_B4.rationale: Transfers the threshold search strategy to a new feature, demonstrating generalisation of the decision-tree procedure.
